entry.title: break up with your boyfriend, i'm bored
entry.summary:
Author: adoringbuck

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,176Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 841

Summary: Buck: eddie??? do u want anything???Eddie: An iced white mocha with sweet cream foam would be great. Thanks Buck  group chat: victims 🫤 (Chim, Hen, Ravi, Maddie)Ravi: 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈 🏳️‍🌈Ravi: that is the gayest order i’ve ever heard in my life Hen: Well, he is gay, Ravi Ravi: yeah and a pain in my ass for it too orA chat fic full of crack. That's literally it.Oh, and Eddie Diaz is gay, and everyone knows it except for Buck.

entry.title: This is Risky Business Buckaroo
entry.summary:
Author: T0tt4llyN0tR0tt3n

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 953Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: The opening tunes to ‘old time rock and roll’ blast as Eddie slides into the perfectly formed archway in his house, he’s wearing a light pink button up shirt, long white socks pulled halfway up his calf’s and ridiculous white underwear he swore to never let out of his dresser drawer.ORMy own depiction of what could’ve happened in 8x6

entry.title: I Will Cross Universes for You
entry.summary:
Author: NyotaGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,767Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 2

Summary: "He wasn't me. How..." Buck's voice cracks, and the sound cuts through Eddie like a knife. "...how could you not see that?" And the tears finally fall, and all Eddie wants is to wrap him in his arms and hold him until they melt into one, until he can ease some of Buck's pain. Pain that he caused. He can only hang how head in shame, ignoring the way his own heart breaks because he should have known better. He should have... OR Buck has an evil doppelganger OR In which Buck's evil 'twin' kidnaps Buck and takes his place and Eddie and the rest of the 118 are none the wiser. In their defense, how could they have known that alternate universes existed?

entry.title: The One Where They Get High
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,273Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Joey walks in the hotel room in London and they both know what is about to happen so Buck puts his fork down and leans back in the couch.“Do you think that’s possible?” Buck asks as the tv audience hoots and hollers in the background for the two friends being in bed together.“Has it been that long for you?”It takes Buck a minute to realize what Eddie was saying and he doesn’t bother giving him an answer. He fights a smile though. He loves when Eddie teases him like that.[ ... ]“No. I uh - I mean. Two friends having sex. Do you think they can just do that? Does that ever work.”“They get married and end the show with newborn twins?”But Buck isn't asking about Monica and Chandler. Everyone knows that they specifically make it. He means just best friends in general but he doesn’t know how to explain that without telling Eddie that he thinks they’re in love with each other.“I’m not high enough for this.”“What?”“You’re so clueless.”“I’m not clueless.”“You’re clueless, dude.”“Buck. I’m not clueless.”

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,525Chapters: 3/24Kudos: 137

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights? When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1.

entry.title: you fall apart and redefine what keeps you up at night (take my hand)
entry.summary:
Author: lifelessframe

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,268Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 6

Summary: Buck struggles when he develops a dependency to opioids. Amidst it all, Eddie realizes life's too short to be afraid. Or something I got an urge to write after watching 9x15 Pick your poison. First part is kind of a rewrite of the scenes we did see on the show with a lot of extra Buck insight, second part has more of the let's say "unseen scenes" so just yk be patient.

entry.title: please stop loving me to death
entry.summary:
Author: Val_in_a_trenchcoat

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,332Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Buck and Eddie accidentally say I love you. Also, Eddie's sister comes out to him. Neither of these mess with his head. Not at all.“Come… out?” Eddie asks, and Sophia’s eyes widen again.“I, uh—yeah.” She tries to smile, and it doesn’t quite look pained, but it’s not exactly happy, either. “I’m engaged. To a woman. Surprise?” She gives weak jazz hands, ridiculous as that might be.Eddie’s throat is dry. He’s not sure what to say. “Thank you… for… trusting me,” he says, and it sounds recorded and replayed. Wooden and stoic. Well-meaning, but with horrible execution.Sophia’s face falls flat, and Eddie’s muscles seize in panic, before she bursts out laughing. She snorts, once, her laughter ugly and child-like and all at once Eddie’s reminded that, not only has he missed his sister terribly, but he still loves her fiercely.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: wrestle like animals
entry.summary:
Author: beetlesandstars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,919Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 250

Summary: “You’re cheating,” Buck accuses. “I’m winning.” Eddie pants, looking far too smug. “I’m—” Buck tries to tug his arms free from Eddie’s hold to no avail. How is Eddie so damn strong? “I’m letting you.” “You’re letting me pin you down? Do you like getting your ass handed to you, Buck?” Heat floods Buck’s gut. He does like getting his ass handed to him. Or—no, well… he likes being pinned, or thrown against walls, or–or floors. But that’s different. That’s a sex thing. This is definitely not a sex thing. This is a bro thing. They’re bro-wrestling. Bro-housing. This is the most platonic thing Buck’s done in his entire life. He doesn’t know why he’s sweating. Channelling his inner carpet python, he gives a determined wriggle, but Eddie’s hands tighten around his wrists. The feeling sends a shock through Buck’s spinal column. Oh no. Eddie, breathless and beautiful above him, repeats, “Say uncle.” Breath stuttering out of him, Buck freezes. Use your head, Buck thinks. His dick twitches. Then, panicked, the big one.Or: Buck and Eddie wrestle over the remote. They forget the remote.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Remember That Night?
entry.summary:
Author: InterrogateTheCat

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,965Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 346

Summary: He was going to watch her find the two seconds of nothingness. And he was going to want it. He was going to need it. He was tired of fighting. He was so unbelievably tired of being strong, of being good, of taking the punishment and hoping that someone, someday, would decide he was worthy of forgiveness, of love. Bobby didn't want him back at the 118. Eddie wouldn't look at him. His parents had never loved him. I wish I could say I feel nothing, Buck thought, a tear finally slipping through his fingers and dropping onto his jeans. But I feel everything. He sat in the darkness of the loft, listening to the shower run, waiting for the ticking clock to strike zero. He was going to relapse tonight. He had already made the choice. Now, it was just a matter of waiting for the moment to arrive. Or, Buck has been sober for six years, during the lawsuit, Buck relapses. 😭🥹💔💊 [You don't need to watch Euphoria to read this, based in the 911 universe, will have enough context about Rue to understand.]

entry.title: to be loved is to be known
entry.summary:
Author: cleverly

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,690Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 128

Summary: “Wait, didn’t we already celebrate?” He asks, thinking back to the beginning of their shift. “I made that cake—” “Right, of course, for Max—” “For Sam.” Buck retorts, eyes narrowed slightly. Laughter bubbles up on the tip of his tongue. “Right.” Eddie nods, biting the inside of his cheek, fighting his own laughter, trying to keep his face serious. He fails, a chuckle escaping him, a dimple appearing on the side of his face.Or, a post 9x16 coda.

entry.title: as i walk with the sun hand in hand from the wreck
entry.summary:
Author: rainny_days

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,895Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 273

Summary: “Hey,” Buck says, in the hospital room after it’s all over. “Just so you know, I’m in love with you.” His voice is raspy, his smile a little self-deprecating. His eyes, when Eddie stares at him in surprise, are steady and blue. He doesn't sound like he’s blurting something out, or getting something off his chest, or confessing something he’s embarrassed of. He just sounds like he’s telling Eddie about the weather, something mundane. The sun is hot in the sky, they’re in New Mexico, and Buck is, apparently, in love with him.Buck confesses to Eddie after the kidnapping. Eddie, in a fit of madness, accepts his confession. It'll be fine - just because Eddie isn't in love with Buck, doesn't mean he can't be his boyfriend.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Too Much, Always Enough
entry.summary:
Author: Salve_El_Atun

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,360Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: Buck's parents' words linger like ghosts: he's too much, too intense, and no one stays. But Eddie keeps proving him wrong —one quiet reassurance, one terrifying call, one perfect day at a time.ORFive times Buck was convinced his intensity would drive Eddie away —and the one time Eddie made sure he never had to wonder again.This story is inspired by "Porfa No Te Vayas" by Morat

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Cassiopeia
entry.summary:
Author: allymime

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,386Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: uhhhh Buck and Eddie go to a lookout. Eddie comes out to buck. They kiss. That's about it! I mostly read fic, I don't write it, so please forgive the shortcomings! This was mostly self indulgent.

entry.title: The Recall
entry.summary:
Author: Rdh

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 146,796Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 1,241

Summary: A mandatory recall from the military reserves plunges Buck into a world he thought he'd left behind. When a routine mission spirals into a nightmare... AKA US Navy SEAL Buck, my love.   *Read tags, not joking when I say super OC focused.
